text:
Created attachment 188423
py-kafka-python-1.3.5

Update port to latest upstream version:
https://github.com/dpkp/kafka-python/releases/tag/1.3.5

Reorder variables: put USES before USE_ according to porters handbook https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/porting-order-uses.html

portlint and poudriere builds are fine.
